title: K8s Monitoring Stack
description: Full observability setup for a multi-node Kubernetes cluster. Prometheus scrapes metrics, Grafana visualizes, Alertmanager pages when things break.

title: Terraform AWS VPC Module
description: A reusable Terraform module that provisions a production-ready VPC with public/private subnets, NAT gateways, and security groups across multiple availability zones.

title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Template
description: Opinionated CI/CD pipeline template for containerized apps. Build → test → scan → push to ECR → deploy to EKS. Includes Trivy security scanning.

title: Docker Compose Dev Lab
description: A collection of Docker Compose setups for spinning up local development environments. Postgres, Redis, Kafka, ELK — all pre-configured and ready to go.

title: DevOps Automation Scripts
description: A growing collection of bash scripts for automating common DevOps tasks: server setup, log rotation, backup pipelines, and health check monitors.

title: Ansible Server Hardening Playbook
description: Ansible playbooks for automating Linux server provisioning and security hardening. Idempotent, tested on Ubuntu 22.04 and Amazon Linux 2.
